top_signals.title: US state department watchdog investigates Gaza Humanitarian Foundation
top_signals.summary: Oversight body scrutinising how $30mn grant was spent by controversial non-profit that had US and Israeli backing
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
top_signals.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of internal CISA systems. Security experts said the public archive included files detailing how CISA builds, tests and deploys software internally, and that it represents one of the most egregious government data leaks in recent history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Musk’s SpaceX sets out plans for biggest IPO in history
top_signals.summary: Satellite and AI company to list on Nasdaq under symbol SPCX
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Results of the March 2026 survey on credit terms and conditions in euro-denominated securities financing and OTC derivatives markets (SESFOD)
Plume secures Bermuda license for what it calls first regulated onchain vault manager
top_signals.summary: Plume's Bermuda subsidiary has secured a Class M BMA digital asset licence, allowing the firm offer regulated onchain vault manager services.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Japan says it has enough power to meet scorching summer demand
top_signals.summary: Households and businesses won't be asked to conserve power, as all regions are expected to have ample supply, according to documents.
